info.english_meaning: to try to strive to make effort to attempt
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: 'yatate tu prayatnArTe nirAkAre tu yAtayet' (Slo. 96) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra raSmiBiryatamAnAH' (tE॰brA॰2.8.2.2) prayatamAnAH praBavantaH pravfttimantaH
'prayatetArTasidDaye' (manu॰7.215) cezwetetyarTaH
'lomAni prayatirmama' (vA॰saM॰20.13) prayatna ityarTaH
'svaDA'vastAtprayatiH parastAt' (f॰10.129.5) prayatiH prayatitA
'samBAnunA yatate sUryasya' (f॰5.37.1) saMyatate=saNgacCate sampUrvako yatirihAkarmakaH
'saM raSmiBiryatate darSato raTaH' (f॰9.111.3) saMyatate=yujyate
'saM…janAYCruDIyataScid yataTo mahitvA' (f॰6.67.3) saMyataTaH=saNgamayaTaH saMyatiriha sakarmakaH
'saM SUraRAso divyAso atyAH haMsA iva SreRiSo yatante' (f॰1.163.10) saMyatante=itaretaramanugacCanti
'saM yanmahI miTatI sparDamAne tanUrucA SUrasAtA yatEte' (f॰7.93.5) saMyatEte saMyatete=yuDyete
'devAsurAH saMyattA Asan' (tE॰saM॰1.5.1.1) saMyattAH=vigfhRAnAH
'saNgrAmaM saMyatizyamARaH' (E॰brA॰8.10) yudDaM karizyamARa ityarTaH
'saNgrAme saMyatta indriyeRa vE manyunA manasA saNgrAmaM jayati' (tE॰saM॰2.2.8.2) saMyattaH=sannadDaH
'saMyattAH samare sarve pAlayaDvaM pitAmaham' (BA॰BIzma॰82.6) saMyattAH=prayattAH
'taTA buDyeta saMyatto vijayeta ripUn yaTA' (BA॰7.200) saMyattaH sAvaDAnaH=jAgarUkaH=prabudDaH=sAvekzaH
'upa preta saMyataDvaM mAntargAtaBAginaM BAgaDeyAt' (Apa॰SrO॰6.8.1)
'saYjAnate na yatante miTaste' (a॰7.75.5) saMyatante=sparDante=viruDyante
'devAsurA vA ezu lokezu samayatanta' (E॰brA॰3.3) samayatanta=asparDanta
'asaMyatto vrate te kzeti' (aTarva॰20.25.3) asaMyattaH=aprayattaH prayatnamakurvARaH
'droRakarRO tu saMyattO paSya yudDe mahAraTO' (BA॰droRa॰183.35) saMyattO=sannadDO=sajjO
'DanurBftaH saMyati labDakIrtayaH' (ki01.19) saMyadyudDam taTA cAmaraH- saMyat samityAjisamidyuDaH
'tayA papasva DArayA iti saNgrAmaM saMyatizyamARasya pratipadaM kuryAt janyA vA eza gA AjihIrzati yaH saNgrAmaM saMyatate' (jE0 brA0 192) saMyatate yuDyate
'saM dAnucitrA uzaso yatantAm' (f0 5598) saMyatantAM sparDantAm dAne'nyonyasaNGarzeRa pravartantAmityAha
'devA vE mftyunA samayatanta' (jE0 brA0 112) mftyO prAtiBawyena prAvartanta mftyunA samaM viroDamAcarannityarTaH
'aSve vE sarvA devatA anvAyattAH' (tE0 brA0 3873) anvAyattA anugatAH sambadDAH
'yamo vEvasvatastasya niryAtayati duzkftam hfdi sTitaH karmasAkzI kzetrajYo yasya tuzyati' (BA0 Adi0 7431).. niryAtayati pariharati
'tatastAdfSo BavAnbanDanAdrAjAnamantaH purAdrAjadArikAmuBe niryAtayatu' (pratijYA0) niryAtayatu=nizkramayatu
'asatIM vapuzwamAM cEva niryAtayata me gfhAt' (hari0 3521) ukto'rTaH
'nyAsaBUtamidaM rAjyaM tava niryAtayAmyaham' (rA0 4109) pratyarpayAmi
'niryAtaya hastanyAsam' (vikrama0 5) ukto'rTaH
'paricArakaM cAtmAnaM boDisattvasya niryAtayAmAsa' (avadA0 cuqU0 jA0) niryAtayAmAsa samarpayAYcakAra
'niryAtayata me senAM praBUtaraTakuYjarAm drakzyAmi vanasaMsTaM ca DftarAzwraM mahIpatim' (BA0 ASrama0 2219).. niryAtayata sajjI kuruta upaskuruDvam
'rAmalakzmaRayorvEraM svayaM niryAtayAmi vE' (rA0 6634) niryAtayAmi=SoDayAmi vigaRayAmi (vEraM parakftamfRamiti gaRyate tadvigaRanIyaM Bavati samarTena)
'saMyujyamAnAni niSamya loke niryAtyamAnAni ca sAttvikAni' (BA0 SAM0 3546).. niryAtyamAnAni nipIqyamAnAni
'putro niryAtitaH kroqAt' (hari0 23218) nirasta ityarTaH
'caturdaSa samA vIra vane niryAtitAstvayA' (rA0 610426) niryAtitA nItAH kzapitAH
'caturdaSa samAH sOmya vane niryAtitAstvayA' (rA0 611921) ukto'rTaH
'pretaniryAtakaScEva varjanIyAH prayatnataH' (manu0 3166) pretanirhAraka ityarTaH
'pratiplavanamevATa maDuniryAtanaM taTA' (rA0 1333) maDuniryAtanaM kzOdraharaRam maDUnAM haraRaM taTeti pAWAntaram
'kzatriyavaDe gosahasramfzaBEkAdaSaM rAjYa utsfjed vEraniryAtanArTam' (bO0 Da0 110191) vErasya pApasyApayAtanArTam
'apayAtanaM nASaH vinivfttezu meGezu niryAtya jagato jalam' ( ) samarpya vitIrya
'niryAtya mahizaM tasya' (kaTA0 62224) ukto'rTaH
'niryAtya vEraM saPalaM sapuzpaM tasmE narendrADamapUruzAya' (BA0 vana0 17610) sa evoditapUrvo'rTaH PalaM rAjyaprAptiH puzpaM SatruvaDa iti nIlakaRWaH
'niryAtya raTavaraM brAhmaRAya' (avadA0 jA0 9)
'caretsAntapanaM kfcCraM tanniryAtyAtmaSudDaye' (manu0 11164) tat=steyaM coritaM Danam
'mAM cAsmE prayato BUtvA niryAtayitumarhasi' (rA0 52121) niryAtayitum pratyarpayitum
'niryAtayatu me kanyAM BavAMstizWantu vAjinaH' (BA0 u0 11720) niryAtayatu pratyarpayatu
'nyastA bahUni varzARi tena niryAtitA ca ha' (rA0 uttara0 3027) ukto'rTaH
'mama niryAtanaM prati anunItaH prayatnena' (rA0 5369).. niryAtanaM pratidAnam
'trIRicCandAMsi kavayo viyetire' (aTarva0 18117) viyetire yatnena kftavantaH kavayaH pUrve jYAnino maharzayo devA vA
'trivftameva yajYamuKe viyAtayati' (tE0 saM0 5113) AnupUrvyA nyasyatItyAha
'tadAtmanA prajYayA piSAcA viyAtayantAm' (aTarva0 52??6) viyAtayantAm nizkurvatAm prAyaScittena SunDantu
'taM yamaH pApakarmARaM viyAtayati duzkftam' (BA0 Adi0 7432) viyAtayati viSezeRa pIqayati
'ApannasattvAyAM kOmAraBftyo garBaBarmaRi prasave ca viyateta' (kO0 a0 11725) viyateta viSezeRa yateta
'trivftameva yajYamuKe viyAtayati' (tE0 saM0 5113) viyAtayati vyApArayati
'sahasraM mayyAyatantAm' (aTarva0 17130) AyatantAM sarvataScezwantAmiti sAyaRaH avatizWantAmiti vArTaH syAt
'kasminnAyataTo jane' (f0 5742) AyataTa AyateTe avatizWeTe
'A te BadrAyAM sumatO yatema' (f0 6110) ukto'rTaH
'A yadvAmIyacakzasA…yatemahi svarAjye' (f0 5666)
'durdAntAnAM damanaviDayaH kzatriyezvAyatante' (mahAvIra0 334) kzatriyADInA BavantItyarTaH
'vayaM tvayyAyatAmahe' (mahAvIra0 149) tvanniGnA BavAma ityarTaH
'mitro janAnAyAtayati bruvARaH' (f0 3511) AyAtayati pravartayati AyAtanamAramBaH tadyaTA BojanamAyAtitamaneneti durgaH
'yajamAnamevEtat svarge loka AyAtayati' (Sa0 brA0 115210) AyAtayati AyatanaM sTAnaM padaM lamBayatItyarTaH
'etameva (agnimeva) tadetasmi~lloka AyAtayati' (E0 brA0 334)
'samyak praSaMsati' (zaqguru0)
'prapAyati' (govinda0)
'prajArakzaRArTaM sarvato yajamAnaM karoti' (Bawwa0)
'AdityarUpaM prakASamAyAtayati prasArayati' (sAyaRaH)
'dEvAyattaM kule janma madAyattaM tu pOruzam' (veRI0 333) madAyattam manniGnam
'BAgyAyattamataH paraM na Kalu tad vAcyaM vaDUbanDuBiH' (SA0 417) ukto'rTaH
'svAyAM diSyAyattam' (Sa0 brA0 93413) Ayattam=kftAvasTAnam
'prahastaH paramAyattastataH susrAva SoRitam' (rA0 6 ) paramAyattaH paramodyuktaH
'sagatA paramAyattA rAmeRa saha saMyuge' (rA0 3366) paramAyattA atyantaM sannadDAH
'dEvameva paraM manye Dik pOruzamanarTakam yatrADiraTirAyatto nAtaratpARqavaM raRe' (BA0 droRa0 1351) Ayatta udyuktaH
'vijane vA''yatane vane girO vA' (budDa0 519) AyatanaM devatAyatanaM devamandiram
'AsmE yatante saKyAya pUrvIH' (f0 10298) Ayatante sarvAtmanA yatante prayasyanti icCintItyarTaH
'A te yatante yaTA pfTak pfTak SarDAMsyagne ajarasya DakzataH (sAma0 uttara0 327) Ayatante sarvato yatante
'A yad vAmIyacakzasA mitra vayaM ca sUrayaH vyacizWe bahupAyye yatemahi svarAjye' (f0 5666).. svarAjye svarAq indraH svarAja indrasya rAjye Ayatemahi AyatanamAspadaM laBemahi
'Bo BoH SUlAyatanAH na Kalu vyApAdayitavyaScandanadAsaH' (mudrA0 7) SUlamAyatanaM jIvanopAyo yezAM te taToktAH
'AyatanavatI rvA anyA Ahutayo hUyante'nAyatanA anyAH' (tE0 saM0 11927) viBaktAvakASaM sTAnamAyatanam
'ni yA devezu yatate vasUyuH' (f0 118611) niyatate devAnAsAdayatItyarTaH
'vakzassu rukmA~ aDi yetare SuBe' (f0 11644) aDiSabdaH saptamyarTAnuvAdI yetire racayAmAsuH nyAsuH
'tvamimAni rakzAMsi pratiyatasva' (Sa0 brA0 9233) pratiyatasva rundDi pratikuru prativiDehi
'kfYaH pratiyatne' (pA0 2353)
'upAt pratiyatnavEkftavAkyADyAhArezu ca' (pA0 61136) sato guRAntarADAnamADikyAya vfdDasya vA tAdavasTyAya samIhA pratiyatnaH
'suganDitAmapratiyatnapUrvAM biBranti yatra pramadAya puMsAm' (SiSu0 354) pratiyatnastu saMskAra iti vEjayantIti malliH
'kftvA hi sumahatkarma hatvA BIzmamuKAnkurUn jayaH prApto yaSaH prAgryaM vEraM ca pratiyAtitam' (BA0 Salya0 5811).. pratiyAtitaM niryAtitaM SoDitam
'BrAtFMstAn vipine tyaktvA vEramapratiyAtya ca' (BA0 vana0 3755) apratiyAtya aniryAtya
'anirvidA yA vidaDe viDAtrA pfTvI pfTivyAH pratiyAtaneva' (SiSu0 334) pratiyAtanA pratikftiH taTA cAmaraH paWati--pratiyAtanA praticCAyA pratikftiriti
'te hocuH svEdAyana tvayA vIreRemaM pratisaMyatAmahA iti' (Sa0 brA0 11413) anena saMyatAmahE imaM pratisamAsAmahE sparDAmahE vivadAmahE saMyatirakarmakaH pratisaMyatiH sakarmakaH
'svEdAyana tvaM vE no brahmizWosIti tvayemaM vIreRa pratisaMyatamahA iti' (go0 brA0 pUrvA0 36) ukto'rTaH
'bAhlIkaH pratisaMyattaH parAkrAntamavArayat' (BA0 droRa0 5944) pratisaMyattaH sannadDaH
'tadasya prAsahAditsanta taM paryayatanta' (paYca0 brA0 726) taM paryayatanta parito'yuDyanteti sAyaRaH prAsahA prasahena balAtkAreReti ca saH
'dASarAjYe pariyattAya (sudAse) viSvataH' (f0 7838) pariyattAya SatruBiH parigatAya parikziptAya
'badDo vA pariyatto vendraM trAtAramupaDAvati' (tE0 saM0 2275) pariyattaH SfNKalAmantareRa parito BawEravarudDa iti BawwaBAskaraH
'tAn samantamevodArAn pariyattAnudapaSyan' (E0 brA0 231) pariyattAn atisannadDAn iti zaqguruSizyaH atyantasanniDAnAn iti tu sAyaRaH
'imaM sa pApmA nopayatate' (Sa0 brA0 8517) nopadravati nopEtItyarTaH
